title: Display activity timeline on history icon click

requirements.summary: Toggle ActivityTimeline component visibility when history icon is clicked, matching the reference image design with vertical timeline, circular markers, timestamps, and colored comment boxes
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the history icon toggles the ActivityTimeline visibility
Timeline displays with vertical line connecting circular markers
Each activity shows timestamp in 'DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM' format on the left
Activity comments appear in colored boxes (alternating light blue, light purple, light green)
Layout matches the uploaded reference image structure

file_operations.description: Add state management for timeline visibility toggle. When the history icon is clicked, toggle the display of the ActivityTimeline component. Ensure the timeline is rendered below the activity form when visible.

Update the timeline visual design to match the reference image: add vertical connecting line between activities, style circular markers with dark blue fill, position timestamps (DD MMM YYYY, HH:MM format) to the left of markers, wrap activity comments in colored boxes alternating between light blue (#E6F4F1), light purple (#F0E6F4), and light green (#E6F4E6). Use flexbox/grid layout to align timestamp-marker-comment horizontally.

Add CSS classes for timeline styling: vertical line connector, circular marker positioning, timestamp styling, and the three alternating comment box background colors (light blue, light purple, light green) with appropriate padding and border radius to match the reference image.

requirements.summary: Update dummy comments data to single short sentences matching the concise style shown in the reference image
acceptanceCriteria: All dummy comments in dummyComments.ts are reduced to single short sentences
Comment text length is similar to examples: 'Payment arrangement agreed upon', 'Confirmed payment received, updating records', 'Customer disputed amount, escalating to supervisor'

file_operations.description: Replace all existing dummy comment text with single short sentences. Use concise, action-focused language similar to the reference examples: 'Payment arrangement agreed upon', 'Confirmed payment received, updating records', 'Customer disputed amount, escalating to supervisor'. Keep each comment to one sentence with approximately 5-10 words.
